events.summary: Retroactive log creation during SSD migration crash recovery; feature was initialized in a prior session (2026-05-19 17:48) but log file was missing — gate now satisfied during preservation commit.
Phase 1 task generation start; prep work (spec + risk + audit) committed to feat/ucc-passkey-security-hardening from preservation branch 01b9366

Phase 2 (Tasks) complete: 26-task list generated; infra master plan overlay written; risk register has 9 entries (3 timing-sensitive, none blocking). Resume = operator approval to advance Phase 2 → Phase 3 (Implementation).
Phase 2 (Tasks) approved by user 2026-05-20. 26-task list captured in tasks.md + state.json::tasks[]; 9-risk infra overlay merged via PR #410.
Phase 3 (Implementation) started. Critical path: T1 → T8 → T9 → T12 → T20 → T22. Code work happens in fitme-story; this FT2 branch carries phase-transition tracking commits only.

Phase 4 (Implementation) complete. fitme-story PR #127 merged 2026-05-20T03:53Z carrying 5 new modules + 2 enum extensions + 5 wirings + 1 CLI + 17/17 unit tests passing. Auth code live on fitme-story.vercel.app.

Phase 5 (Testing) complete in partial-live mode. S2+S3 confirmed live on production (route serves + allowlist accepts allowed email). S4-S6 covered by 17 unit tests in allowlist.test.ts + redis-lockout.test.ts (all passing). T+7d kill-criteria check pending 2026-05-27.
Phase 6 (Review) complete. PR #127 reviewed + merged via fitme-story repo. No formal /design pre-merge-review (no UI changes — auth code only).

Phase 7 (Merge) complete. fitme-story PR #127 squash-merged 2026-05-20T03:53Z. Vercel auto-deployed to fitme-story.vercel.app within ~3min. Production smoke-tested (HTTP 200 root + HTTP 401 fake-token route check).
Phase 8 (Documentation) start. Creating case study placeholder + B11 cadence entry + W12 observed pattern. Phase 9 (complete) gated on 2026-05-27 T+7d kill-criteria evaluation.
